name: Navy Federal More Rewards American Express

welcome_offer.description: 20,000 bonus points ($200 value) when you spend $2,000 within 90 days. Expires Jun 30, 2026.

other_benefits.name: Entertainment Access
other_benefits.description: Early access to presale tickets for shows, sports, and concerts via Amex Entertainment.

other_benefits.name: Up to 30% off Hotel Bookings
other_benefits.description: Through Booking.com on the Amex Benefits platform.

other_benefits.name: Up to 25% off Car Rentals
other_benefits.description: With major car rental companies worldwide.

other_benefits.name: Car Rental Loss & Damage Insurance
other_benefits.description: Coverage against damage to or loss of a rental automobile in the US or Canada.

other_benefits.name: Roadside Assistance
other_benefits.description: Including towing, transport, vehicle replacement, and continuation of journey.

other_benefits.name: Collision Damage Waiver
other_benefits.description: Secondary CDW coverage when renting a car.
